title: SpaceX Files for $75 Billion IPO — Largest in History
script: SpaceX just filed for the largest IPO in history. The company is seeking $75 billion — more than double the previous record held by Saudi Aramco. At $135 per share and a $1.77 trillion valuation, SpaceX would be worth more than every company on Earth except Apple and Nvidia. Elon Musk retains 82 percent of voting power. If the deal closes, Musk becomes the world's first trillionaire. The roadshow starts this week.
